task_completion.description: The correct security incident case is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase UI shows the case titled 'Security Incident - Server Room B Access' open in the main viewing area.

task_completion.description: The existing draft document is located in the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Documents section or tab is open, and 'Investigation_Plan.txt' is visible in the list of files.

task_completion.description: A versioning action is initiated on the existing document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A context menu, dropdown, or modal dialog is open showing an action like 'Upload New Version', 'Update', 'Check Out', or 'Check In' specifically for 'Investigation_Plan.txt'.

task_completion.description: The correct final file is selected for the version update.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file picker or upload dialog shows 'Investigation_Plan_FINAL.txt' selected from the local Documents folder.

task_completion.description: The document is successfully versioned without being deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The document list shows 'Investigation_Plan.txt' with an updated version number (e.g., v2, 2.0) or a version history panel showing multiple versions. There should be no evidence of the original file being deleted.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ArkCase web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser and ArkCase interface being used, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The original document was not deleted.
integrity.visual_evidence: No screenshots show the agent clicking 'Delete' or confirming a deletion for 'Investigation_Plan.txt'.

integrity.description: The file was uploaded via the system file picker.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OS-level file selection dialog (e.g., GTK file chooser) is visible in at least one screenshot, selecting the local file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case Title: 'Security Incident - Server Room B Access'. Document Name: 'Investigation_Plan.txt'. Local file to upload: '/home/ga/Documents/Investigation_Plan_FINAL.txt'.
